description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.89 (foreground color: #d3dfea, background color: #3c6fa2, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
help: Page should contain a level-one heading

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading

description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
help: All page content should be contained by landmarks

nodes.html: <a class="..." aria-label="Back to cart, number of items: 2" href="/cart">
nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Some page content is not contained by landmarks

Fix any of the following:
  Some page content is not contained by landmarks
